revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This template creates a link to [[mw:Extension:Cite]]
{{tlx|cite.php|bug}} creates {{cite.php|bug}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This template creates a link to [[mw:Extension:Cite]]
{{tlx|cite.php|bug}} creates {{cite.php|bug}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite.php%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite.php%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This template creates a link to [[mw:Extension:Cite]]
{{tlx|cite.php|bug}} creates {{cite.php|bug}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
